must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Minimum 2 years of experience in a high pace, analytical environment such as tier 1 consulting, investment banking or growth stage startups
Excellent project management skills with the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and work effectively with cross-functional teams at all levels of the organization
Strong communication and analytical skills with the ability to translate data into actionable insights and recommendations
Being a power user of our App and excited about financial markets, banking and financial education

scope.surface: Intersection of Product and Growth (Internationalization & Marketing) teams across 17 markets
scope.business_model: B2C savings and investment platform, free-to-use model
primary_metrics_inferred: Campaign performance across global growth channels
core_responsibilities: Developing the customer facing communication and launch strategy for new and existing products
Coordinating execution of launches across our global growth channels (paid marketing, press, engagement and own social media) across our 17 markets
Collaborating closely with the product management and operations team to funnel back customer insights
Driving data analysis to inform USP, communication, creative and budget decisions within the growth organization as well as tracking performance of campaigns

green_flags: Clear role scope at intersection of product and growth with 17 markets exposure
Company scale disclosed: 10M+ customers, 150B+ in assets, 18 countries
Strong DEI commitment stated with named recruiter contact for questions
Mission-driven company narrative (closing pension gap, democratising wealth)
red_flags: Work authorization and visa sponsorship terms not explicitly stated beyond relocation support
Role is Berlin-only onsite with no mention of hybrid or remote flexibility
No nice-to-haves listed — requirements section is sparse, making it harder to calibrate fit

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 2-year minimum and no people management signals)
location.visa_sponsorship (inferred as yes-conditional from relocation support mention; not explicitly stated)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
ambiguities: JD says Trade Republic 'operates in 18 countries' in the company description but references '17 markets' in the responsibilities section — minor inconsistency, likely one market is home market (Germany).
Visa sponsorship is not explicitly addressed; relocation support is mentioned, which may or may not include visa assistance. Treated as yes-conditional.
